---
title: "Figure 1"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)

source("knitr.R")
source("theme.R")
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source("data.R")
```

# Preliminaries

```{r prelim}
my_pal <- c(
  # Blue
  "#C7DBF2",  # light blue
  "#4C72B0",  # medium blue
  "#234567",  # dark blue
  
  # Orange
  "#FAD7B2",  # light orange
  "#DD8452",  # medium orange
  "#A15322",  # dark orange
  
  # Teal
  "#BFE6E2",  # light teal
  "#55A868",  # medium teal
  "#1B6B4A"   # dark teal
)

my_pal_12 <- c(
  # Blue (lightest → darkest)
  "#D8E4F6",  # very light blue
  "#A8C2E8",  # light blue
  "#4C72B0",  # medium blue
  "#1E3B5A",  # dark blue
  
  # Orange
  "#FCE1C3",  # very light orange
  "#F3B881",  # light orange
  "#DD8452",  # medium orange
  "#9B4A1C",  # dark orange
  
  # Teal
  "#CDECE7",  # very light teal
  "#93CEC2",  # light teal
  "#55A868",  # medium teal
  "#1A5B43"   # dark teal
)

timings$n_comp <- as.factor(timings$n_comp)
timings$n_hvg <- as.factor(timings$n_hvg)
timings$n_neig <- as.factor(timings$n_neig)

timings$comps_hvgs <- as.factor(paste0(timings$n_comp,":",timings$n_hvg))
timings$comps_neig <- as.factor(paste0(timings$n_comp,":",timings$n_neig))


timings_m <- melt(timings %>% select(-comps_hvgs, -comps_neig), 
                  id.vars = c("dataset", "method", "module", "filtering",
                              "n_comp", "n_neig", "n_hvg", "d_cluster"))

timings_m %>% filter(n_comp == 30, n_neig == 15, n_hvg==2000,
                     dataset=="cb", method=="osca", filtering=="manual")


```



# Timings figures

```{r timings, fig.height=5, fig.width=9}

ggplot(timings, aes(method, pca, colour=comps_hvgs)) + 
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = .85,
                                             jitter.width = .2, 
                                             jitter.height = 0)) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_pal) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_log10()


ggplot(timings, aes(method, leiden, colour=n_neig)) + 
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = .6,
                                             jitter.width = .2, 
                                             jitter.height = 0)) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_pal_12) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_log10()



ggplot(timings, aes(method, umap, colour=n_comp)) + 
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 1,
                                             jitter.width = .2, 
                                             jitter.height = 0)) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_pal[c(2,5,8)]) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_log10()




timings_m$method_cluster <- as.factor(paste0(timings_m$method,".",timings_m$d_cluster))

ggplot(timings_m %>% filter(filtering == "manual", n_comp == 20, 
                            n_neig == 15, n_hvg==2000, module != ""
                            !(variable %in% c("find_mit_gene","filter",
                                              "t_sne","leiden"))), 
       aes(x = method_cluster, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales="free_y")
#+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

```

# ARI v Timings

```{r leiden-ari-vs-total-timing, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=8}
timing_cols_keep <- paste0("timings_", c(
  "find_mit_gene", "filter", "normalization",
  "hvg", "scaling", "pca", "leiden"
))

ari_vs_total_timing <- metrics_new %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual") %>%
  mutate(total_seconds = rowSums(pick(all_of(timing_cols_keep)), na.rm = TRUE))

ari_vs_total_timing_top <- ari_vs_total_timing %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  mutate(ari_p95 = quantile(agree_ari_leiden, probs = 0.95)) %>%
  filter(agree_ari_leiden >= ari_p95) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-ari_p95)

p_ari_vs_total_timing <- ggplot(
  ari_vs_total_timing_top,
  aes(x = total_seconds, y = agree_ari_leiden, color = method)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_number()) +
  labs(
    x = "Total timing <i>(s)</i>",
    y = "Leiden ARI",
    color = "Method"
  )

p_ari_vs_total_timing
```

# Compare with Iliana

```{r compare-iliana}
iliana_long <- iliana %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(agree_ari_leiden, agree_ari_louvain),
    names_to = "best_for", values_to = "iliana_ari"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    best_for = recode(
      best_for,
      agree_ari_leiden = "leiden", agree_ari_louvain = "louvain"
    )
  )

p_ari <- metrics_new %>%
  group_by(dataset, method) %>%
  summarize(
    leiden = quantile(agree_ari_leiden, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    louvain = quantile(agree_ari_louvain, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(leiden, louvain),
    names_to = "best_for", values_to = "our_ari"
  ) %>%
  arrange(method, dataset, best_for)

compare_ari <- p_ari %>%
  left_join(iliana_long, by = c("dataset", "method", "best_for")) %>%
  mutate(
    method = factor(method, levels = names(met_cols)),
    best_for = factor(as.character(best_for), levels = c("leiden", "louvain")),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = dataset_levels)
  ) %>%
  arrange(method, dataset, best_for)

compare_ari
```

```{r plot-iliana, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=5}
ari_limits_p95 <- range(
  c(compare_ari$iliana_ari, compare_ari$our_ari_p95),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_iliana <- ggplot(compare_ari, aes(
  x = iliana_ari, y = our_ari,
  color = method, size = best_for, shape = dataset
)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "<i>Billato et al.</i> ARI", y = "Our 95<sup>th</sup> percentile ARI",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = ari_limits_p95, ylim = ari_limits_p95) +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Dataset") +
  scale_size_manual(name = "Algorithm", values = c(leiden = 2.5, louvain = 1.5))

p_iliana
```

# Patchwork

```{r fig2, fig.height=7.6, fig.width=6.69}
layout_main <- "
AA
BB
CD
"

p_main_panels <- (
  (p_ari_leiden_paths + guides(color = "none")) +
    (p_ari_vs_total_timing + guides(color = "none")) +
    p_iliana +
    guide_area()
) +
  plot_layout(
    design = layout_main,
    widths = c(0.90, 1.10),
    heights = c(1.35, 1.35, 1.0),
    guides = "collect"
  ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "left",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.direction = "vertical"
  )

p_main_panels
```
